'''Jatayus Outbound''' was a shipping company with local offices on [[Novor 23]]. It was known publicly for serving the length of the [[Sisar Run/Legends|Sisar Run]], but was merely a front for the illicit business operations of [[Sprax]], a [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] [[Vigo/Legends|vigo]].

Jatayus specialized in bulk and medium interstellar [[Transport/Legends|transport]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]. It owned one [[Super Transport series|super transport]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], the [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] [[Warren (starship)|''Warren'']].

{{Company-stub}}
